ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., L, 1X) */,
  "size_label_type" TEXT /* Type of size label (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart this size belongs to */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., regular, plus, petite) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "chart_category" TEXT /* Category of the size chart (e.g., women, men, kids) */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* File path to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_width" REAL /* Sleeve width measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in cm (for pants) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the measurement is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., dress, shirt, pants) */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "product_gender" TEXT /* Gender for the product (e.g., women, men) */,
  "product_age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the product (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "product_season" TEXT /* Season for the product (e.g., spring, summer) */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for the product */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product size is stored */,
  "online_store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the online store where the product size is available */,
  "is_in_stock" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product size is in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, warehouse staff, customer service) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., size, product, measurement) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the guide belongs to */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the size guide */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description of the size guide */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the size guide document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the size guide was last updated */,
  "guide_version" TEXT /* Version number of the size guide */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the size guide is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the history entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
